items.name: BBQ Pulled Pork Tray
items.description: Slow-smoked pulled pork with our signature BBQ sauce. Served with slider buns on the side.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Tray
items.description: Herb-marinated grilled chicken breast, sliced and ready to serve.

items.name: Smoked Beef Brisket Tray
items.description: 12-hour smoked brisket with our house dry rub. Sliced thick and tender.

items.name: Italian Meatball Tray
items.description: Handcrafted beef and pork meatballs in marinara sauce, topped with parmesan.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Fajita Tray
items.description: Grilled peppers, onions, mushrooms, and zucchini with fajita seasoning.

items.name: Creamy Mac & Cheese
items.description: Four-cheese blend with a crispy breadcrumb topping. A crowd favorite.

items.name: Fresh Garden Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, and red onion. Dressings on the side.

items.name: Classic Coleslaw
items.description: Creamy coleslaw with shredded cabbage and carrots.

items.name: Roasted Seasonal Vegetables
items.description: Roasted broccoli, carrots, and Brussels sprouts with olive oil and herbs.

items.name: Honey Cornbread Basket
items.description: Warm cornbread muffins with honey butter on the side.

items.name: Slow-Cooked Baked Beans
items.description: Sweet and savory baked beans with bacon and brown sugar.

items.name: Classic Potato Salad
items.description: Creamy potato salad with celery, egg, and a touch of mustard.

items.name: Deli Sandwich Platter
items.description: Assorted deli sandwiches: turkey, ham, and roast beef. Cut in halves and arranged beautifully.

items.name: Veggie Wrap Platter
items.description: Hummus, grilled vegetables, and feta in spinach wraps. Cut and arranged.

items.name: Chicken Caesar Wrap Platter
items.description: Grilled chicken, romaine, parmesan, and Caesar dressing in flour tortillas.

items.name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
items.description: Warm spinach artichoke dip with pita chips and vegetables for dipping.

items.name: Chicken Wing Platter
items.description: Crispy fried wings with your choice of sauce: Buffalo, BBQ, or Garlic Parmesan.

items.name: Mini Meatball Bites
items.description: Bite-sized meatballs with toothpicks and marinara dipping sauce.

items.name: Fresh Veggie Platter
items.description: Carrots, celery, broccoli, cherry tomatoes, and cucumbers with ranch dip.

items.name: Artisan Cheese Board
items.description: Selection of cheeses with crackers, grapes, and honey.

items.name: Chocolate Brownie Tray
items.description: Rich, fudgy chocolate brownies cut into squares.

items.name: Assorted Cookie Platter
items.description: Chocolate chip, oatmeal raisin, and snickerdoodle cookies.

items.name: Mini Cheesecakes
items.description: Individual New York-style cheesecakes with fruit topping.

items.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
items.description: Seasonal fresh fruits beautifully arranged.

items.name: Fresh Lemonade (Gallon)
items.description: House-made lemonade. One gallon serves approximately 10-12 cups.

items.description: Classic Southern sweet tea. One gallon serves approximately 10-12 cups.
